privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available since there is no metadata field in task.json. The task requires the agent to synthetically generate Garmin BaseCamp waypoints and routes from scratch using coordinates provided in the prompt. While the coordinates map to the real-world Middlesex Fells Reservation in Massachusetts (e.g., 42.4450, -71.1120 is Brooks Road in Medford), the tactical operational data itself is fictitious and not derived from an external dataset.
